description_long: This is a stylized adult pedestrian figure with a rounded body and simplified facial features. The person is dressed in a sleeveless top layered over a long-sleeve shirt, paired with shorts and ankle-high shoes. The figure has a full face, short hair, and a generally stocky build, with arms resting at the sides. The clothing is form-fitting and lacks intricate details, emphasizing a cartoon-like appearance. The shoes are blocky and the hands and feet are minimally detailed, consistent with a low-poly design. The overall look suggests a casual, everyday urban pedestrian.
description: A stylized, stocky adult pedestrian in casual layered clothing and ankle-high shoes, with simplified features and a cartoon-like build.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, chest, and both arms extended slightly outward.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the rounded profile, protruding belly, and the side of the head and limbs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, broad back, and both legs from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and side details of the clothing and limbs.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless top over a long-sleeve shirt and shorts, casual style
